title: Scarsdale Squirrel Removal Services | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Scarsdale, NY. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair for homes in Westchester. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Scarsdale homeowners know that the village's mature trees and spacious properties create an ideal habitat for squirrels, which often leads to attic invasions and structural damage. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Scarsdale, from the Heathcote area to Fox Meadow, protecting your home from these persistent pests. Our humane removal methods ensure your property remains squirrel-free while preserving the character of your Westchester residence.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Scarsdale's unique pest control needs, understanding the specific challenges posed by the area's large estates and wooded lots. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods and provide complete exclusion services to prevent future infestations, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Scarsdale's historic homes and tree-lined streets along the Bronx River Parkway create perfect conditions for squirrel activity, especially in neighborhoods near Popham Road and the Scarsdale Golf Club. The village's strict building codes and architectural standards require pest control professionals who understand how to protect your valuable property while maintaining its aesthetic integrity.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Scarsdale?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Scarsdale typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of entry points, and the extent of damage repair needed. Larger Scarsdale estates or homes with multiple access points may fall on the higher end of this range, while single-entry situations are generally more affordable.

faqs.question: What does squirrel removal service include in Scarsdale?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive squirrel removal service includes a thorough property inspection, humane trapping and removal of all squirrels, identification and sealing of entry points, attic cleanup and sanitization, damage repair to insulation and wiring, and preventative exclusion measures. We also provide follow-up visits to ensure your Scarsdale home remains squirrel-free.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Scarsdale homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Scarsdale due to the village's abundant oak and maple trees, large wooded properties, and proximity to nature preserves. Squirrels typically enter attics and crawl spaces during fall and winter months seeking warm nesting sites, and they can cause significant damage to insulation, electrical wiring, and roof structures if not removed promptly.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Scarsdale home?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Scarsdale are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the complexity of the situation. We typically begin with an inspection within 24 hours of your call, set traps immediately, and once all squirrels are removed, we seal entry points and complete repairs. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations.
